channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned motor scooter with license plate removed, 1st July
item.description:
This Motor scooter has been left abandoned for approximately five days. I expect it was used in a crime or stolen as the license plate was removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Maple Leaf Drive, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Croft way on the way up to tennis courts, 1st July
item.description:
There are LOTS of nettles and brambles overhanging the pathway of Croft Way. These are dangerous and need to be trimmed back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Way, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned pallets and bins overflowing, 1st July
item.description:
Loads of pallets dumped for last week and recycling bins overflowing again attracting rats and squirrels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Estate Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The car has been there a long time the doors were open it’s taking up a space and it’s filthy, 1st July
item.description:
Car hasn’t moved has no tax or mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trenholme Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley dumped in Cockmannings Road, 1st July
item.description:
Left outside house number 46 many thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cockmannings Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 1st July
item.description:
Tremaine road has had no sweeping nor weed removal and looks a mess-can this be addressed asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tremaine Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slabs broken and risen, 1st July
item.description:
Outside house 106 Domonic drive the pathway is extremely hazardous and all falling apart. Some slabs are risen and is a major trip hazard. Could this issue be looked at urgently please. It would be nice to have the slabs replaced and not just filled with tarmac as it’s very unsightly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domonic Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley in front pond sluice., 1st July
item.description:
A blue trolley was thrown into the sluice last night by hooligans and is still there. The trolley belongs to Lopetos cafe. Needs to be returned to them if they want it back?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Hill, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 metre large pothole, 1st July
item.description:
It is very dangerous to cars, bikes and cylists. It is located on Cray Road leading from Crokenhill but inside the Bromley Council boundary.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Kevington Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish usual place cossall park, 1st July
item.description:
Same place as always

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st July
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a table and chairs and some boxes outside our building. It's been here for a few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spilled, 1st July
item.description:
Van has left loads of paint in the gutter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warren Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, uninsured, abandoned car, 1st July
item.description:
This car has been sitting at the same spot for over 2 years now abandoned taking up parking spaces for local residents needs to be removed asap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leabank Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside children's park Burton rd NW6, 1st July
item.description:
A man was seen carrying the items and placing tbem near the tree on Sunday 28th June at 21:45

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Taking up all our pay and display and parking bays, 1st July
item.description:
Voi seems to have dumped a load of bikes in pay and display and parking bays

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ardleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet another incidence!, 1st July
item.description:
Enough is enough! An hour or so after you cleared a previous fly tip another incident has taken place AT THE EXACT SAME SPOT, namely the corner of Olinda Rd. it’s appalling, you have CCTV so use it because this can’t continue. These people are pigs!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Delivery vehicles daily idling at Rahims cash and carry, 1st July
item.description:
We at Leabank Square are sick and tired of heavy delivery vehicles idling diesel engines when parked at Rahims, Atlas wharf, E9 5NB. Every single day the vehicles leave their heavy diesel engines running for hours we can smell the toxic fumes and noise
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berkshire Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased Fox, 1st July
item.description:
Deceased fox in communal gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Tanneries, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped trolley, 1st July
item.description:
Students from Elm green now using it as transport

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maley Avenue, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bike, rusted out, 1st July
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Avenue, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
